# M11: Collaborative Access + Ownership

## Target
All collaborators can view, interrupt, and resume sessions started by others.

## Scope
- Define access rules for sessions within shared graphs.
- Persist session metadata for cross-user visibility.
- Add audit trail for control actions (by user).

## Acceptance
1) Any collaborator can access session stream.
2) Any collaborator can pause/resume.
3) Audit data records who took control actions.
